_note: GK detachment modifiers — game mechanics only. Engine loads this for DPP/SURV/MOB computation. Modeled as always-on unless noted.

WARPBANE TASK FORCE._engine_note: Verified 11e from 40k.app. Hallowed Ground rule: all GK re-roll hits of 1; PURIFIER SQUAD units always re-roll the Hit roll (full re-roll) as do any GK unit wholly within Hallowed Ground.

choices.name: Hallowed Re-rolls
choices.condition: all GREY KNIGHTS units re-roll hits of 1; units wholly within Hallowed Ground re-roll the Hit roll instead
choices.description: All GREY KNIGHTS re-roll Hit rolls of 1. Units wholly within Hallowed Ground re-roll the Hit roll (full re-roll) instead.
choices._engine_note: Base level: all GK get re-roll 1s to hit. Units wholly within Hallowed Ground upgrade to full re-roll. Modelled as reroll_hits 1s for DPP estimation with Hallowed Ground assumed.

choices.name: Purifier Zeal
choices.condition: PURIFIER SQUAD units always re-roll the Hit roll (unconditional — not dependent on Hallowed Ground)
choices.description: Purifier Squads always re-roll the Hit roll, regardless of Hallowed Ground position
choices._engine_note: Purifiers get full re-roll to hit unconditionally (not conditional on Hallowed Ground). PREVIOUSLY had incorrect condition requiring Hallowed Ground.

choices.name: Dauntless Champions
choices.condition: when S of attacks is lower than T of target (not greater)
choices.description: Paladin Squads gain +1 to wound when their Strength is LOWER than target Toughness
choices._engine_note: Condition fixed per GH article: +1 to wound triggers when S < T (not S > T as previously listed). Typical use case: S6 melee vs T8+ vehicles/monsters.

choices.name: Truesilver Aegis
choices.description: 1CP stratagem: 4+ Feel No Pain vs mortal wounds for Paladin Squads. Cannot be modelled as always-on FNP.
choices._engine_note: This is a 1CP stratagem (Truesilver Aegis), not an always-on ability. Engine models always-on modifiers only. No numeric FNP modifier applied — usage is CP-dependent and situational.

choices.name: Echojump Surge
choices.condition: after shooting, cannot teleport or charge same turn; surge D6+1"
choices.description: Interceptor Squads make D6+1" surge move after shooting (avg 4.5", rounded to 4). Cannot use Personal Teleporters or charge same turn.
choices._engine_note: Surge move (D6+1") is modelled as movement_bonus for MOB approximation. Actual rule is an out-of-sequence move after shooting, not a static speed increase. Cannot charge same turn.

choices.name: Astral Overlap
choices.description: Interceptor Squad gains Stealth (-1 to hit from ranged) as an upgrade enhancement
choices._engine_note: Listed as an upgrade enhancement in the GH article. GH notes it's not great because cover is easy to get in 11e.

BANISHERS._engine_note: Verified 11e from 40k.app. Channelled Force: GK unit takes LD test → choose Sustained Hits 1 or Lethal Hits for melee Psychic weapons for the phase.

choices.name: Sustained Hatred
choices.condition: melee only, after passing Leadership test
choices.description: Melee Psychic weapons gain Sustained Hits 1 after passing Leadership test
choices._engine_note: Channelled Force: choose Sustained Hits 1 OR Lethal Hits per activation after passed LD test. Modelled as always-on for DPP estimation.

choices.name: Lethal Hatred
choices.condition: melee only, after passing Leadership test
choices.description: Melee Psychic weapons gain Lethal Hits after passing Leadership test
choices._engine_note: Channelled Force: choose Sustained Hits 1 OR Lethal Hits per activation after passed LD test. Modelled as always-on for DPP estimation.

BROTHERHOOD STRIKE._engine_note: Verified 11e from 40k.app. Fury of Titan: unit set up via Deep Strike re-rolls Hit and Wound rolls of 1 until end of turn.

choices.name: Fury of Titan
choices.condition: after Deep Strike arrival, until end of turn
choices.description: Re-roll 1s to hit and wound after Deep Strike arrival until end of turn
choices._engine_note: Conditional on Deep Strike arrival — modelled as always-on for DPP estimation. Correct from 10e codex.

HALLOWED CONCLAVE._engine_note: Verified 11e from 40k.app. Duty Before All: TERMINATOR units eligible to shoot and charge in a turn they Fell Back.

choices.name: Duty Before All
choices.description: Terminator-armoured units can Fall Back and shoot/charge
choices._engine_note: Verified from 40k.app. Correct from 10e codex — no 11e change to this rule.

SANCTIC SPEARHEAD._engine_note: Verified 11e from 40k.app. Mailed Fist: VEHICLE units that Advance skip the roll, get +6" M, and ranged weapons gain ASSAULT.

choices.name: Mailed Fist
choices.condition: when Advancing: no Advance roll, +6" M, ASSAULT on ranged weapons until end of turn
choices.description: GREY KNIGHTS VEHICLE units: when Advancing, add 6" to Move and weapons gain ASSAULT
choices._engine_note: Applies to ALL GREY KNIGHTS VEHICLE units, not just specific vehicle types. PREVIOUS unit_filter was incorrectly limited to specific vehicle names.

AUGURIUM TASK FORCE._engine_note: Verified 11e from 40k.app. Prescient Redeployment: from round 2, can place a GK unit into Strategic Reserves at start of Movement phase if didn't use max Gate of Infinity. No numeric MOB modifier applicable — this is a redeployment flexibility rule, not a movement speed increase. PREVIOUSLY fabricated as movement_bonus: 3. Stripped per AGENTS.md detachment integrity rules.

choices.name: Searing Soulflame
choices.condition: battleshock debuff — not a DPP modifier
choices.description: When a Purgation Squad pins a target via Righteous Persecution, that target makes a battleshock roll at -1. No direct damage modifier.
choices._engine_note: PREVIOUSLY FABRICATED as Sustained Hits 1. Actual rule: battleshock debuff on pinned targets (-1 to battleshock roll). Cannot be modelled as a DPP modifier — it's a control/board effect, not a damage buff. Previous modifier stripped per AGENTS.md detachment integrity rules.

choices.name: Soul-Locked Advance
choices.condition: 1CP stratagem: falling back does not prevent shooting
choices.description: 1CP stratagem: Purgation Squads can Fall Back and still be eligible to shoot
choices._engine_note: This is a 1CP stratagem (Soul-Locked), not an always-on ability. Modelled as fallback_and_shoot for MOB estimation. GH article rates it as fine but unlikely to be worth CP.
